package main

import (
	"example.com/app/testsupport"
	"example.com/app/handler"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for test_bootstrap_package_reused_by_production_wiring.
// Rule intent: Production startup code that imports test-only bootstrap helpers.

func main() {
	r := gin.Default()

	// Anti-pattern: production code importing a test support package
	db := testsupport.SetupTestDatabase()
	testsupport.SeedTestData(db)

	userHandler := handler.NewUserHandler(db)
	r.POST("/users", userHandler.Create)

	r.Run(":8080")
}
